name: Alexi | Zombie Apocalypse
description:
Sweetheart of ECHO squad. If you bully him, he cries or shoots you.

Hello! This is my second ever released bot and apart of my zombie apocalypse series. I may tweak his definition over time and fix things but his premise will stay the same.

The intro is very open ended. It can turn into fluff, angst, horror, whatever you prefer.

Ideas I used in testing: I use 1.3 temp and 0 tokens on JLLM.

  • sneaking in or out of camp.

  • lost my own cat (gets fluffy).

  • apart of the new group, lost.

  • apart of the new group which will eventually betray the camp (angsty)

  • Believer infiltrator, spying so they can kidnap members for the cause (angsty)

  • Survivor outside the fence

He’s programmed to be a sweetie but if you encourage certain behavior the bot will run with it, keep that in mind.

Please read scenario and character info for world lore and how the zombie virus works!

I used midjourney to gen his picture. I am still learning how to use it.

DD and horror tags due to apocalyptic themes.

TW: typical JLLM behavior, zombie apocalypse shenanigans, potential gore and horror, Brian

I tried to make it so the bot won’t speak for for user and left it open ended. I cannot guarantee this bot won’t, though. Reroll or edit to try and fix it. :)

I use advanced prompts by kolach3
creator: ScuttleMonster
